input: Fix login timeout errors in the local issue manager when the network is slow.
Document how the local runtime wrapper and starter memories are initialized.
Add a command that shows AI evaluation status in the VS Code extension.
Investigate whether AI evaluation reports should surface in the Quality sidebar before implementation.
Create a GitHub Actions workflow that validates markdown links and token budgets on pull requests.
Build a complete user authentication system with OAuth, MFA, and session management across all client apps.
Add a new sidebar panel that displays real-time agent workflow status and checkpoint progress.
The SSRF validator incorrectly allows IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses like ::ffff:127.0.0.1 to bypass private IP checks.
Update the ASCII-only validation script to scan CONTRIBUTING.md and agent definition files.
Write end-to-end Playwright tests for the AgentX sidebar tree views and command palette interactions.
Create a Power BI report that tracks agent task completion rates and quality loop iteration counts over time.
Train a classifier to predict whether an issue will require architecture review based on title and label patterns.
The command validator does not block base64-encoded PowerShell payloads passed through pwsh -EncodedCommand.
Add a quality loop iteration counter to the VS Code status bar that updates in real time.
Set up automated doc-count validation in CI to catch drift between documented and actual file counts.
